education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Tool & Die Making / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Tool & Die Making
raw_text:
68. Tooling Consultant

Job Summary  
Provides expert advice on tooling design, manufacturing, maintenance, and optimization to 
improve pro ductivity and reduce costs.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Analyze existing tooling systems and processes  
• Recommend improvements in tool design and performance  
• Support troubleshooting of complex tooling issues  
• Advise on material selection and tooling strategies  
• Conduct audits and prepare technical reports  
• Guide tool room teams and train staff  
Required Skills  
• Deep knowledge of tooling processes and applications  
• Strong analytical and problem -solving skills  
• Communication and presentation skills  
• Cost optimizatio n and process improvement expertise  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Tool & Die  
Experience  
• 8–15+ years  
Earnings (India)  
• ₹1,000 – ₹5,000 per hour  
• ₹50,000 – ₹3,00,000 per project (depending on scope)
